verses.1: A Song of degrees of David. LORD, my heart is not haughty, nor my eyes lofty: neither do I exercise myself in great matters, or in things too high for me.
verses.2: Surely I have behaved and quieted myself as a child that is weaned by his mother: my soul is even as a weaned child.
verses.3: Let Israel hope in the LORD from henceforth and for ever.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
